items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for operational data support.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement to support both staffing and fulfillment-origin operational data. However, the evidence provided does not include any API responses or data that confirm this functionality. The linked use case mentions the need for such support, but there are no concrete examples or evidence of how this is implemented or tested, leading to an inconclusive result.
